body: Trust checks require a registry server.json and optional .mcpb bundle to verify.
Provide --server-json (and --mcpb if available) to enable trust checks.
Hardproof could not read the provided server.json path.
Ensure --server-json points to a readable file.
Fix the server.json JSON syntax and retry.
server.json could not be parsed as a JSON object.
Fix the server.json JSON syntax and retry.
server.json does not include publisher-provided trust metadata.
Publish server.json with registry publisher metadata under _meta.
Publisher metadata is present but trustPack pins are missing, so transparency and signature checks cannot run.
Publish trustPack pins (registry, packId, packVersion, snapshotSha256, checkpointSha256) in server.json.
The .mcpb sha256 does not match the server.json declared fileSha256.
Rebuild and republish the bundle and server.json with matching digests.
Hardproof could not fetch the trust registry index pinned by trustPack.registry.
Ensure the trust registry URL is reachable and allowed by the SSRF policy.
Trust registry index JSON is missing required fields or has an unsupported schema_version.
Publish a valid trust registry index (x07.mcp.trust.registry@0.2.0).
root.json is not a valid trust registry root document.
Publish a valid trust registry root.json.
Transparency checkpoint JWT could not be verified against the witness key.
Fix witness checkpoint signing or publish a valid checkpoint.
Checkpoint payload does not match the trustPack snapshot pins or is expired.
Publish a checkpoint that matches the pinned snapshotSha256 and minSnapshotVersion.
timestamp.jwt or snapshot.jwt could not be verified against the trust registry root keys.
Fix trust registry timestamp/snapshot signing or publish updated root keys.
timestamp/snapshot payloads are inconsistent, expired, or violate anti-rollback constraints.
Publish valid timestamp and snapshot metadata that passes the trust verification rules.
Registry index does not include the trustPack packId.
Publish the referenced trust pack to the registry, or update server.json trustPack pins.
Pack index does not include the pinned trustPack.packVersion.
Publish the referenced packVersion or update server.json trustPack pins.
decls.name: scan.trust.exec_v1
